_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: This is also true for most of the combinations evaluated in our human TM31 cell line (see Tables 1 and 2). Our results highlight the degree to which the NF1-HGG are sensitive to these drugs
details: Shows high baseline sensitivity to compounds with LD50 values at or below 25th percentile of IC50 values from cancer cell line databases
